meaning: vt.分开,分离,分遣,派遣(军队)
examples: The skis should detach from the boot if you fall.
I tried to detach myself from the reality of these terrible events.
They clambered back under the falls to detach the raft from a jagged rock.
Detach the microphone boom and take the lightweight headphones with you for a stylish audio solution.
When they are being serviced, always detach your home keys from your vehicle keys.
